cgpa_normalized.action_template: Improve CGPA from {orig:.1f}/10 to {target:.1f}/10 through consistent exam performance
cgpa_normalized.feasibility: HIGH if in Year 1-2, MEDIUM if in Year 3-4, LOW if graduated

internships_count.action_template: Complete {delta:.0f} additional internship(s) — target companies with structured programmes

backlogs.action_template: Clear {delta:.0f} backlog(s) in upcoming supplementary exams
backlogs.feasibility: HIGH — supplementary exams available for all backlogs

placement_rate_for_field.action_template: Consider institution with higher placement rate ({orig:.0%} → {target:.0%})

demand_proxy.action_template: Transition to adjacent high-demand field — add certifications in {field} specialisation
